implementation_notes: Use the refined visual direction as the resume family anchor.
Keep section headings canonical for ATS extraction.
Avoid wide letter spacing on text that must extract as normal words.
Do not treat fixture copy as approved candidate content.
open_items: Matching cover letter approval remains separate unless explicitly confirmed.
Letter and resume need short/typical/long content fixtures before implementation is complete.
Both A4 and Letter behavior should be verified during implementation.
